per_outcome.operationalization: Points awarded across all tasks: MC tasks scored 0 or 1; SATA options scored proportionally; free response scored by LLM identifying key facts present
Each SATA option treated as binary question, score proportional to number of options classified correctly
One point for correct multiple choice answer, zero for incorrect
LLM grader identifies presence of key facts, score is proportion of key facts included in response
Time in minutes from task start to completion, measured by experimental platform
LLM grader evaluates clarity and organization of free response answers
Self-reported satisfaction with Copilot on 0-100 slider scale across statements about effort, productivity, quality, and future use preference
Self-reported feelings about task experience on 0-100 slider scale covering effectiveness, control, security, job appeal, adequacy, uncertainty, effort, and drain
